mapper.select: SELECT app_code, app_name, source_system, owner, ip_whitelist, permission_scope, status, status_type, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_gateway_app ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT gateway_code, gateway_name, channel_type, protocol_type, sign_algorithm, endpoint, status, status_type, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_gateway_channel ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT certificate_code, gateway_code, certificate_version, DATE_FORMAT(expire_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS expireAt, status, status_type, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_gateway_certificate ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT permission_code, app_code, scope, status, status_type, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM t_gateway_permission ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_gateway_channel WHERE status = 'ENABLED'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_gateway_certificate WHERE status = 'ENABLED'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_gateway_permission WHERE status = 'ENABLED'
mapper.update: UPDATE t_gateway_app SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE app_code = #{appCode}
UPDATE t_gateway_channel SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE gateway_code = #{gatewayCode}
UPDATE t_gateway_certificate SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE certificate_code = #{certificateCode}
UPDATE t_gateway_permission SET status = #{status}, status_type = #{statusType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode}
